scripts.prepare:frontend: npm run prepare:startup && npm --prefix ../noobot-chat run build
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare:frontend && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:win:dir: npm run prepare:frontend && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check ../shared/electron/main.js && node --check ../shared/electron/preload.cjs && node --check ../shared/electron/startup-logging.js && node --check ../shared/electron/desktop-config.js && node --check ../shared/electron/file-ipc.js && node --check ../shared/electron/dependency-specs.js && node --check ../shared/electron/dependency-process.js && node --check ../shared/electron/dependency-managed-mac.js && node --check ../shared/electron/dependency-detect.js && node --check ../shared/electron/dependency-installer.js && node --check ../shared/electron/desktop-dependencies.js && node --check ../shared/electron/desktop-services.js && node --check ../shared/electron/desktop-window.js && node --check ../shared/electron/startup-ipc.js && node --check ../shared/electron/dev-launcher.mjs && node --test ../shared/tests/electron/*.test.js
scripts.build:win:portable: npm run prepare:frontend && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.build:win:zip: npm run prepare:frontend && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --win zip
